title: pavonia scabra
intro: Pavonia scabra, also known as rough rosemallow or rough hibiscus, is a flowering plant species native to Mexico and Central America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been attributed to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Pavonia scabra include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat skin conditions such as wounds and eczema, making it a popular herbal remedy in many parts of the world. Herbal preparations of Pavonia scabra include infusions, decoctions, and ointments, which are often used to treat a range of health issues, from skin conditions to respiratory problems.
